# Wine Country Guide — Napa & Sonoma Valley Wineries

> A comprehensive directory of wineries in Napa Valley and Sonoma County, California.

## About

Wine Country Guide is a free, searchable directory of 191+ wineries across Napa Valley and Sonoma County. The site provides detailed profiles including wines produced, tasting experiences with pricing, hours, amenities, and visitor information.

## Data Coverage

- 191+ wineries across Napa Valley and Sonoma County
- 2,270+ wines cataloged across 22 varietals (Cabernet Sauvignon, Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and more)
- 670+ tasting experiences with pricing from $25 to $500+
- Sub-regions: Oakville, Rutherford, St. Helena, Yountville, Calistoga, Carneros, Stags Leap, Russian River Valley, Dry Creek Valley, Sonoma Valley, and more

## Key Features

- Search and filter wineries by region, price, rating, varietal, and amenities
- Detailed winery profiles with wines, tastings, hours, and contact info
- Interactive map view of all wineries
- Side-by-side winery comparison tool
- Curated day-trip route suggestions
- Amenity filters: dog-friendly, picnic-friendly, walk-ins welcome

## Useful URLs

- Homepage: https://napa-winery-search.vercel.app
- Browse all wineries: https://napa-winery-search.vercel.app/wineries
- Map view: https://napa-winery-search.vercel.app/map
- Day trip routes: https://napa-winery-search.vercel.app/day-trips
- Individual winery pages: https://napa-winery-search.vercel.app/wineries/{winery-slug}

## Contact

This site is maintained as an independent guide to help visitors plan wine country trips.
